presets.title: Trail Strength A/B: Lower Body Power
presets.description: Structured 2-session program for trail runners targeting lower body power and hip stability.
presets.notes: Two alternating sessions with emphasis on single-leg strength and hip control for technical terrain.

presets.title: Road Runner Foundation: Base Strength
presets.description: Adaptive general strength block for road runners — the engine picks exercises from the user's pool.
presets.notes: Beginner-friendly block for road runners building foundational strength. The engine selects exercises based on available equipment.

presets.title: Descent Control: Eccentric Quad Protocol
presets.description: Eccentric-focused program to build braking capacity and protect the knee for technical descents.
presets.notes: Slow eccentric tempos on quad-dominant exercises. Low weekly progression for safe tendon adaptation.

tsp_trail_strength_ab_faithful_01.name: Força Trail A/B: Potència Tren Inferior
tsp_trail_strength_ab_faithful_01.description: Programa estructurat de 2 sessions per a trail runners amb èmfasi en potència de cames i estabilitat de cadera.

tsp_road_foundation_generator_02.name: Fonaments d'Asfalt: Força Base
tsp_road_foundation_generator_02.description: Bloc adaptatiu de força general per a corredors de carretera — el motor selecciona exercicis automàticament.

tsp_descent_eccentric_faithful_03.name: Control de Baixada: Protocol Excèntric de Quàdriceps
tsp_descent_eccentric_faithful_03.description: Programa enfocat en excèntrics per millorar la capacitat de frenada i protegir el genoll en baixades tècniques.

tsp_trail_strength_ab_faithful_01.name: Fuerza Trail A/B: Potencia Tren Inferior
tsp_trail_strength_ab_faithful_01.description: Programa estructurado de 2 sesiones para trail runners con énfasis en potencia de piernas y estabilidad de cadera.

tsp_road_foundation_generator_02.name: Base en Asfalto: Fuerza Inicial
tsp_road_foundation_generator_02.description: Bloque adaptativo de fuerza general para corredores de asfalto — el motor selecciona ejercicios automáticamente.

tsp_descent_eccentric_faithful_03.name: Control de Bajada: Protocolo Excéntrico de Cuádriceps
tsp_descent_eccentric_faithful_03.description: Programa enfocado en excéntricos para mejorar la capacidad de frenado y proteger la rodilla en bajadas técnicas.

tsp_trail_strength_ab_faithful_01.name: Trail Strength A/B: Lower Body Power
tsp_trail_strength_ab_faithful_01.description: Structured 2-session program for trail runners targeting lower body power and hip stability.

tsp_road_foundation_generator_02.name: Road Runner Foundation: Base Strength
tsp_road_foundation_generator_02.description: Adaptive general strength block for road runners — the engine selects exercises automatically.

tsp_descent_eccentric_faithful_03.name: Descent Control: Eccentric Quad Protocol
tsp_descent_eccentric_faithful_03.description: Eccentric-focused program to build braking capacity and protect the knee for technical descents.
